scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/popup/popup.ts src/content/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --outbase=src --format=iife && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently "tsc --noEmit --watch" "esbuild src/popup/popup.ts src/content/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --outbase=src --format=iife --watch" "web-ext run --source-dir dist/ --start-url https://www.leboncoin.fr/"
scripts.start: npm run build && web-ext run --source-dir dist/ --start-url https://www.leboncoin.fr/
scripts.package: npm run build && web-ext build --source-dir dist/ --artifacts-dir releases/ --overwrite-dest
scripts.sign: npm run build && web-ext sign --source-dir dist/ --artifacts-dir releases/ --channel=unlisted --api-key=$AMO_API_KEY --api-secret=$AMO_API_SECRET
